caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering, and a gold chain around his neck sits in a studio setting. He wears professional over-ear headphones and speaks into a silver microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a repeating logo that says "UNIQUE HUSTLE" accompanied by gold stars. Above him, a blue sign reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". On the table in front of him sits a black mug with red and white text that says "THE TALK OUT LOUD PODCAST". A small logo featuring a microphone and the text "TALK OUT LOUD" appears in the lower-left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing slightly with his head and facial expressions as he speaks.
